# harvester_kubeovn_provider_network (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_kubeovn_provider_network" "example" {
  name = "example-provider-net"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Read-Only

- `custom_interfaces` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_interfaces))
- `default_interface` (String)
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `exchange_link_name` (Boolean)
- `exclude_nodes` (List of String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `status_not_ready_nodes` (List of String)
- `status_ready` (Boolean)
- `status_ready_nodes` (List of String)
- `status_vlans` (List of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--custom_interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `interface_name` (String)
- `nodes` (List of String)
